contents: From HoTT Require Import Basics Types.
From HoTT Require Import Basics Types.
From HoTT.WildCat Require Import Core Equiv.

Instance ispointed_fiber {A B : pType} (f : A ->* B) : IsPointed (hfiber f (point B))
  := (point A; point_eq f).
Definition pfiber {A B : pType} (f : A ->* B) : pType := [hfiber f (point B), _].

Definition pfib {A B : pType} (f : A ->* B) : pfiber f ->* A
  := Build_pMap pr1 1.
(** The double fiber object is equivalent to loops on the base. *)

Definition pfiber2_loops {A B : pType} (f : A ->* B)
  : pfiber (pfib f) <~>* loops B.

goals.conclusion: pfiber (pfib f) <~>* loops B
pfiber (pfib f) <~>* loops B
pfiber (pfib {| pointed_fun := f; dpoint_eq := 1 |}) <~>* loops [B, f pt]
pfiber (pfib {| pointed_fun := f; dpoint_eq := 1 |}) <~> loops [B, f pt]
?f pt = pt

equiv_adjointify
  (fun H : pfiber (pfib {| pointed_fun := f; dpoint_eq := 1 |}) =>
   (fun H0 : hfiber f (f pt) =>
    (fun (H1 : A) (H2 : f H1 = f pt) (H3 : (H1; H2).1 = pt) =>
     paths_ind_r pt
       (fun (y : A) (_ : y = pt) => f y = f pt -> loops [B, f pt])
       (fun H4 : f pt = f pt => H4 : loops [B, f pt]) H1 H3 H2)
      H0.1 H0.2)
     H.1 H.2)
  (fun H : loops [B, f pt] =>
   ((let H0 := pt in H0; H : f (let H0 := pt in H0) = f pt) : hfiber f (f pt);
   1
   :
   ((let H0 := pt in H0; H : f (let H0 := pt in H0) = f pt) : hfiber f (f pt)).1 =
   pt)
   :
   pfiber (pfib {| pointed_fun := f; dpoint_eq := 1 |}))
  ((fun H : loops [B, f pt] => 1)
   :
   (fun H : pfiber (pfib {| pointed_fun := f; dpoint_eq := 1 |}) =>
    (fun H0 : hfiber f (f pt) =>
     (fun (H1 : A) (H2 : f H1 = f pt) (H3 : (H1; H2).1 = pt) =>
      paths_ind_r pt
        (fun (y : A) (_ : y = pt) => f y = f pt -> loops [B, f pt])
        (fun H4 : f pt = f pt => H4 : loops [B, f pt]) H1 H3 H2)
       H0.1 H0.2)
      H.1 H.2)
   o (fun H : loops [B, f pt] =>
      ((let H0 := pt in H0; H : f (let H0 := pt in H0) = f pt)
       :
       hfiber f (f pt);
      1
      :
      ((let H0 := pt in H0; H : f (let H0 := pt in H0) = f pt)
       :
       hfiber f (f pt)).1 =
      pt)
      :
      pfiber (pfib {| pointed_fun := f; dpoint_eq := 1 |})) ==
   idmap)
  ((fun H : pfiber (pfib {| pointed_fun := f; dpoint_eq := 1 |}) =>
    (fun H0 : hfiber f (f pt) =>
     (fun (H1 : A) (H2 : f H1 = f pt) (H3 : (H1; H2).1 = pt) =>
      paths_ind_r pt
        (fun (y : A) (p : y = pt) =>
         forall H4 : f y = f pt,
         ((let H5 := pt in H5;
          paths_ind_r pt
            (fun (y0 : A) (_ : y0 = pt) => f y0 = f pt -> loops [B, f pt])
            idmap y p H4);
         1) = ((y; H4); p))
        (fun H4 : f pt = f pt => 1) H1 H3 H2)
       H0.1 H0.2)
      H.1 H.2)
   :
   (fun H : loops [B, f pt] =>
    ((let H0 := pt in H0; H : f (let H0 := pt in H0) = f pt)
     :
     hfiber f (f pt);
    1
    :
    ((let H0 := pt in H0; H : f (let H0 := pt in H0) = f pt)
     :
     hfiber f (f pt)).1 =
    pt)
    :
    pfiber (pfib {| pointed_fun := f; dpoint_eq := 1 |}))
   o (fun H : pfiber (pfib {| pointed_fun := f; dpoint_eq := 1 |}) =>
      (fun H0 : hfiber f (f pt) =>
       (fun (H1 : A) (H2 : f H1 = f pt) (H3 : (H1; H2).1 = pt) =>
        paths_ind_r pt
          (fun (y : A) (_ : y = pt) => f y = f pt -> loops [B, f pt])
          (fun H4 : f pt = f pt => H4 : loops [B, f pt]) H1 H3 H2)
         H0.1 H0.2)
        H.1 H.2) ==
   idmap)
  pt =
pt

contents:
Definition pfiber_fmap_loops {A B : pType} (f : A ->* B)
  : pfiber (fmap loops f) <~>* loops (pfiber f).

goals.conclusion: pfiber (fmap loops f) <~>* loops (pfiber f)
pfiber (fmap loops f) <~>* loops (pfiber f)
pfiber (fmap loops f) <~> loops (pfiber f)
?f pt = pt
pfiber (fmap loops f) <~> loops (pfiber f)
pfiber (fmap loops f) <~> ?Goal
?Goal <~> loops (pfiber f)

pfiber (fmap loops f) <~>
{p : pt.1 = pt.1 & transport (fun x : A => f x = pt) p pt.2 = pt.2}

{x : pt = pt & (point_eq f)^ @ (ap f x @ point_eq f) = pt} <~>
{p : pt = pt & transport (fun x : A => f x = pt) p (point_eq f) = point_eq f}

forall a : pt = pt,
(fun x : pt = pt => (point_eq f)^ @ (ap f x @ point_eq f) = pt) a <~>
(fun p : pt = pt =>
 transport (fun x : A => f x = pt) p (point_eq f) = point_eq f) a

(point_eq f)^ @ (ap f p @ point_eq f) = pt <~>
transport (fun x : A => f x = pt) p (point_eq f) = point_eq f

ap f p @ point_eq f = point_eq f @ pt <~>
transport (fun x : A => f x = pt) p (point_eq f) = point_eq f

ap f p @ point_eq f = point_eq f <~>
transport (fun x : A => f x = pt) p (point_eq f) = point_eq f

point_eq f = (ap f p)^ @ point_eq f <~>
transport (fun x : A => f x = pt) p (point_eq f) = point_eq f

(ap f p)^ @ point_eq f = point_eq f <~>
transport (fun x : A => f x = pt) p (point_eq f) = point_eq f
transport (fun x : A => f x = pt) p (point_eq f) = (ap f p)^ @ point_eq f

(fun (x y z : Type) (f0 : x <~> y) (g : y <~> z) => equiv_compose g f0)
  (pfiber (fmap loops f))
  {p : pt.1 = pt.1 & transport (fun x : A => f x = pt) p pt.2 = pt.2}
  (loops (pfiber f))
  ((equiv_functor_sigma_id
      (fun p : pt = pt =>
       equiv_concat_l (transport_paths_Fl p (point_eq f)) (point_eq f)
       oE equiv_path_inverse (point_eq f) ((ap f p)^ @ point_eq f)
       oE equiv_moveL_Vp (point_eq f) (point_eq f) (ap f p)
       oE equiv_concat_r (concat_p1 (point_eq f)) (ap f p @ point_eq f)
       oE equiv_moveL_Mp pt (ap f p @ point_eq f) (point_eq f)
       :
       (fun x : pt = pt => (point_eq f)^ @ (ap f x @ point_eq f) = pt) p <~>
       (fun p0 : pt = pt =>
        transport (fun x : A => f x = pt) p0 (point_eq f) = point_eq f) p)
    :
    hfiber (fun p : pt = pt => (point_eq f)^ @ (ap f p @ point_eq f)) pt <~>
    {p : pt = pt &
    transport (fun x : A => f x = pt) p (point_eq f) = point_eq f})
   :
   pfiber (fmap loops f) <~>
   {p : pt.1 = pt.1 & transport (fun x : A => f x = pt) p pt.2 = pt.2})
  (equiv_path_sigma (fun x : A => f x = pt) pt pt) pt =
pt

contents:
Definition pr1_pfiber_fmap_loops {A B} (f : A ->* B)
  : fmap loops (pfib f) o* pfiber_fmap_loops f
    ==* pfib (fmap loops f).

goals.conclusion: fmap loops (pfib f) o* pfiber_fmap_loops f ==* pfib (fmap loops f)
fmap loops (pfib f) o* pfiber_fmap_loops f ==* pfib (fmap loops f)
fmap loops (pfib f) o* pfiber_fmap_loops f == pfib (fmap loops f)

?p pt =
dpoint_eq (fmap loops (pfib f) o* pfiber_fmap_loops f) @
(dpoint_eq (pfib (fmap loops f)))^
fmap loops (pfib f) o* pfiber_fmap_loops f == pfib (fmap loops f)

(fmap loops (pfib f) o* pfiber_fmap_loops f) (u; v) =
pfib (fmap loops f) (u; v)
ap (pfib f) (pfiber_fmap_loops f (u; v)) = pfib (fmap loops f) (u; v)

contents: exact (@ap_pr1_path_sigma _ _ (point A; point_eq f) (point A;point_eq f) _ _).

goals.conclusion:
((fun x : pfiber (fmap loops f) =>
  (fun (u : loops A) (v : fmap loops f u = pt) =>
   (concat_1p (ap (pfib f) (pfiber_fmap_loops f (u; v)) @ 1) @
    concat_p1 (ap (pfib f) (pfiber_fmap_loops f (u; v)))) @
   ap_pr1_path_sigma (1%equiv (u; v).1)
     ((fun p : pt = pt =>
       equiv_concat_l (transport_paths_Fl p (point_eq f)) (point_eq f)
       oE equiv_path_inverse (point_eq f) ((ap f p)^ @ point_eq f)
       oE equiv_moveL_Vp (point_eq f) (point_eq f) (ap f p)
       oE equiv_concat_r (concat_p1 (point_eq f)) (ap f p @ point_eq f)
       oE equiv_moveL_Mp pt (ap f p @ point_eq f) (point_eq f)
       :
       (fun x0 : pt = pt => (point_eq f)^ @ (ap f x0 @ point_eq f) = pt) p <~>
       (fun p0 : pt = pt =>
        transport (fun x0 : A => f x0 = pt) p0 (point_eq f) = point_eq f) p)
        (u; v).1 (u; v).2))
    x.1 x.2)
 :
 fmap loops (pfib f) o* pfiber_fmap_loops f == pfib (fmap loops f)) pt =
dpoint_eq (fmap loops (pfib f) o* pfiber_fmap_loops f) @
(dpoint_eq (pfib (fmap loops f)))^

Definition pfiber_fmap_iterated_loops {A B : pType} (n : nat) (f : A ->* B)
  : pfiber (fmap (iterated_loops n) f) <~>* iterated_loops n (pfiber f).

goals.conclusion: pfiber (fmap (iterated_loops n) f) <~>* iterated_loops n (pfiber f)
pfiber (fmap (iterated_loops n) f) <~>* iterated_loops n (pfiber f)
pfiber (fmap (iterated_loops 0) f) <~>* iterated_loops 0 (pfiber f)
pfiber (fmap (iterated_loops n.+1) f) <~>* iterated_loops n.+1 (pfiber f)

hypotheses.type: pfiber (fmap (iterated_loops n) f) <~>* iterated_loops n (pfiber f)

goals.conclusion: pfiber (fmap (iterated_loops n.+1) f) <~>* iterated_loops n.+1 (pfiber f)

goals.conclusion:
loops (pfiber (fmap (iterated_loops n) f)) <~>*
iterated_loops n.+1 (pfiber f)

goals.conclusion:
pfiber (fmap (iterated_loops n) f) $<~>
(fix F (m : nat) : pType :=
   match m with
   | 0%nat => pfiber f
   | m'.+1%nat => loops (F m')
   end)
  n

hypotheses.type: pfiber (fmap (iterated_loops n) f) <~>* iterated_loops n (pfiber f)

Definition pequiv_pfiber {A B C D}
           {f : A ->* B} {g : C ->* D} (h : A <~>* C) (k : B <~>* D)
           (p : k o* f ==* g o* h)
  : pfiber f $<~> pfiber g
  := Build_pEquiv (functor_pfiber p) _.

goals.conclusion: h o* pfib f ==* pfib g o* functor_pfiber p

hypotheses.type: k o* f ==* g o* h

goals.conclusion: ?p pt = dpoint_eq (h o* pfib f) @ (dpoint_eq (pfib g o* functor_pfiber p))^

hypotheses.type: k o* f ==* g o* h

goals.conclusion: h o* pfib f == pfib g o* functor_pfiber p

hypotheses.type: k o* f ==* g o* h

goals.conclusion:
((fun x : pfiber f => 1) : h o* pfib f == pfib g o* functor_pfiber p) pt =
dpoint_eq (h o* pfib f) @ (dpoint_eq (pfib g o* functor_pfiber p))^

goals.conclusion: 1 @ dpoint_eq (pfib g o* functor_pfiber p) = dpoint_eq (h o* pfib f)

goals.conclusion:
1 @
(ap pr1
   (path_sigma_uncurried (fun x : C => g x = pt)
      (functor_hfiber2 p (point_eq k) (ispointed_fiber f))
      (ispointed_fiber g)
      (point_eq h;
      transport_paths_Fl (point_eq h)
        (((p pt)^ @ ap k (point_eq f)) @ point_eq k) @
      moveR_Vp (((p pt)^ @ ap k (point_eq f)) @ point_eq k) 
        (point_eq g) (ap g (point_eq h))
        (concat_pp_p (p pt)^ (ap k (point_eq f)) (point_eq k) @
         moveR_Vp (ap k (point_eq f) @ point_eq k)
           (ap g (point_eq h) @ point_eq g) (p pt) 
           (point_htpy p)^))) @
 1) =
1 @ point_eq h

Definition square_pequiv_pfiber {A B C D}
           {f : A ->* B} {g : C ->* D} (h : A <~>* C) (k : B <~>* D)
           (p : k o* f ==* g o* h)
  : h o* pfib f ==* pfib g o* pequiv_pfiber h k p
  := square_functor_pfiber p.
(** The triple-fiber functor is equal to the negative of the loop space functor. *)

Definition pfiber2_fmap_loops {A B : pType} (f : A ->* B)
: pfiber2_loops f o* pfib (pfib (pfib f))
  ==* fmap loops f o* (loops_inv _ o* pfiber2_loops (pfib f)).

goals.conclusion:
pfiber2_loops f o* pfib (pfib (pfib f)) ==*
fmap loops f o* (loops_inv A o* pfiber2_loops (pfib f))

pfiber2_loops f o* pfib (pfib (pfib f)) ==*
fmap loops f o* (loops_inv A o* pfiber2_loops (pfib f))

Build_pMap
  (fun H : hfiber pr1 point0 =>
   paths_ind_r point0
     (fun (y : A) (_ : y = point0) => f y = f point0 -> f point0 = f point0)
     idmap (H.1).1 H.2 (H.1).2)
  1
o* pfib (pfib (pfib {| pointed_fun := f; dpoint_eq := 1 |})) ==*

o* (Build_pMap inverse 1

            idmap (H.1).1 H.2 (H.1).2)

  1
o* pfib (pfib (pfib {| pointed_fun := f; dpoint_eq := 1 |})) ==

o* (Build_pMap inverse 1
    o* Build_pMap

?p pt =
dpoint_eq

(dpoint_eq

  1
o* pfib (pfib (pfib {| pointed_fun := f; dpoint_eq := 1 |})) ==

o* (Build_pMap inverse 1
    o* Build_pMap

(Build_pMap

paths_ind_r point0
  (fun (y : A) (_ : y = point0) => f y = f point0 -> f point0 = f point0)
  idmap x q p =
1 @
(ap f

      idmap (x; p) r q)^ @

contents: (** Apparently [destruct q] isn't smart enough to generalize over [p]. *)

move q before x; revert dependent x;
      refine (paths_ind_r _ _ _); intros p r; cbn.

      idmap (pt; p) r 1)^ @
 1)

     idmap (pt; p) r 1)^

p =
